battleTraits.name: Heralds of Nagash
battleTraits.effect: Your unit of Morghast Archai is not set up during the deployment phase. Instead, from the second battle round onwards, it can use the 'Dread Descent' ability.

battleTraits.name: Dread Descent
battleTraits.timing: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Movement Phase
battleTraits.effect: Set up this unit anywhere on the battlefield more than 6" from all enemy units.

battleTraits.name: Relentless Discipline
battleTraits.declare: Pick a friendly unit to be the target.
battleTraits.effect:
Make a discipline roll of D6. Add 1 to the roll if the target is wholly within 12" of your general. On a 4+, pick 1 of the following effects:
- Your Movement Phase: Add 2" to the target's Move characteristic for the rest of the phase.
- Your Charge Phase: Add 1 to charge rolls for the target for the rest of the phase.
- Any Combat Phase: Add 1 to wound rolls for combat attacks made by the target for the rest of the phase.
- Any Combat Phase: The target has Ward (5+) for the rest of the phase.

enhancements.name: Shard Storm
enhancements.declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 12" of your general to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
enhancements.effect: On a 7+, roll a number of dice equal to the number of models in the target unit. For each 5+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target.

enhancements.name: Mend Constructs
enhancements.declare: Pick a visible friendly unit wholly within 12" of your general to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

enhancements.name: Lode of Saturation
enhancements.effect: Subtract 1 from the Rend characteristic of melee weapons used for combat attacks that target this general.

enhancements.name: Helm of Tyranny
enhancements.timing: Once Per Battle, End of Your Turn
enhancements.declare: Pick an enemy unit within 12" of your general to be the target and roll a dice.
enhancements.effect: On a 3+, subtract 3 from the control score of the target for the rest of the turn.

regimentAbilities.name: Peerless Cohesion
regimentAbilities.timing: Once Per Turn (Army), Reaction: You declared the 'Relentless Discipline' ability
regimentAbilities.effect: You can use the 'Relentless Discipline' ability for a second time this phase but you must pick a different target to the one you picked the first time.

regimentAbilities.name: Immaculate Generalship
regimentAbilities.effect: Add 1 to discipline rolls you make.

abilities.name: Refined Creations
abilities.declare: Pick a visible friendly unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
abilities.effect: On a 5+, the target's melee weapons have Crit (2 Hits) until the start of your next turn.

abilities.name: Soulbound Protectors
abilities.effect: Your general has Ward (5+) while they are within this unit's combat range.

abilities.name: Switch Aspects
abilities.effect:
Pick 1 of the following effects to apply for the rest of the turn:
- Blade-parry Aspect: Subtract 1 from hit rolls for combat attacks that target this unit.
- Destroyer Aspect: Ward rolls cannot be made for damage points inflicted by this unit's combat attacks.

abilities.name: Heralds of Nagash
abilities.effect: Add 1 to discipline rolls for this unit while it is not wholly within 12" of your general.
